role: This directory contains example specification files for the ArchSpine mirror system, demonstrating metadata structures for project, unit, manifest, rule, and folder definitions.
responsibility: Collectively, these example files define and document the standardized formats and required fields for spine metadata documents used to track, index, and govern source code in the ArchSpine mirror system. They provide templates for representing project identity, module structure, content hashes, synchronization state, architectural rules, and component dependencies.

children.role: Index record for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking the state of indexed source files, synchronization metadata, and reverse index completeness.
Defines project identity, module structure, and provenance metadata for the ArchSpine semantic indexing system.
Defines a single architectural governance rule that prevents direct imports from the database layer into service or middle-tier code.
Defines an architectural rule that prohibits service layers from directly importing database adapters, ensuring separation of concerns.
Spine unit document for the authentication source module in the ArchSpine mirror system.
